scenarios.name: Stateful REST API fuzzing with HTML report
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses st run with --stateful=links, --checks all, --hypothesis-max-examples, --report and --cassette-path; baseline runs schemathesis with --checks all only and omits stateful chaining and HTML report flags.

scenarios.name: Schemathesis in GitHub Actions with JUnit upload
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the schemathesis/action@v1 action, passes --junit-xml=results.xml, and uploads results via actions/upload-artifact; baseline runs schemathesis directly with no JUnit output or artifact upload.
